--- Digital Telemetry Data ---
Pollutant: PM2_5
Quantization Bits: 8
Levels: 256
Min Value: 0.0393651
Max Value: 100.47956666666666
Step Size (delta): 0.3938831433986928

--- PCM Bitstream ---
00011100 00100100 00101101 00101110 00101100 00100011 00010011 00010001 00001101 00001110 00001100 00010100 00011110 00110000 00110011 00110101 00111010 00111000 00111110 00111001 01000010 01001001 01000100 00111010 00110000 00101000 00010111 00011110 00100111 00101110 00101001 00110001 00101001 00011110 00011111 00100110 00101000 00100110 00111100 00111111 00110011 00111010 01000000 00111110 01000011 01000001 01000011 01000000 00111001 00100000 ...

--- Line Coding Method ---
NRZ-L: 1 → +1, 0 → -1

--- Integrity Check Method ---
Even Parity: Parity bit added to each PCM word to make the total number of 1s even.
Example:
Original PCM: 00011100
Parity bit added: 000111001
